base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of bonus_chance_slot — a ui from 1988 super mario bros 2. Bonus Chance slot-machine — cherries/mushrooms/flowers/Starmen. Triggered between levels by accumulating cherries. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Bonus Chance slot-machine — cherries/mushrooms/flowers/Starmen. Triggered between levels by accumulating cherries
